mapper.select: SELECT survey_id, username, cost_rate, employee_rate, service_rate, equip_rate, injury_issue, injury_area FROM "h_survey" WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY survey_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s1.survey_id, s1.username, s1.cost_rate, s1.employee_rate, s1.service_rate, s1.equip_rate, s1.injury_issue, s1.injury_area FROM "h_survey" s1 JOIN ( SELECT username, MAX(survey_id) AS max_survey_id FROM "h_survey" GROUP BY username ) latest ON s1.username = latest.username AND s1.survey_id = latest.max_survey_id ORDER BY s1.survey_id DESC
